title: Designed for the way you work today
paragraphs: FM is a collection of desks with a simple, contemporary form, designed for functional workspaces.

The desktop and legs, made of furniture board, create a cohesive and visually balanced structure, while metal spacer details add a sense of lightness and emphasize the refined character of the design.
packshotImageAlt: FM desk system product shot – L-shaped oak desktop with black steel frame on white background

features.title: Modular Design
features.desc: Infinitely configurable to fit any workspace layout

features.title: Height Adjustable
features.desc: Electric sit-stand mechanism with memory presets

features.title: 10-Year Warranty
features.desc: Built to last with premium materials and craftsmanship
